name: Zhu Yuan | Routine Rescue
description:
"It's a good thing I was around this time y’know! Are you alright...?"

At this point the goat Miketronico is going to be on all my ZZZ bots since they’re the only person I can talk to on ZZZ, so thanks Miketronico for the help on the bot again!

Currently while making this I’m watching bowser vs eggman lol, just shows how sidetracked I am. (Edit: that was peak) Anyways I have a lot of bots planned, but for now I’m just warming up, giving filler before I give that good shit, and trust me..it’s good shit. So please enjoy and see you all on the next bot! Bye bye! 💙🚔

Here’s a hint on the next bot, mommy 😏
creator: Capt
